name: note
description: Generic note: a portable text-bearing thing. Notes are first-class movable objects so they can travel between rooms, actor inventories, bulletin boards, and other containers without losing identity. A note has three slots: name (listing identity), description (cosmetic look-at flavour, optional), and text (markdown content; capped at 65536 characters). Subclass for richer behaviors (pinboard pins, dispensed notes, tasks); the base shape is text plus readers/writers permissions.

classes.description: A movable text artifact with a markdown body. Identity slot is the inherited .name; cosmetic look-at slot is the inherited .description; payload is .text (a single string, markdown by convention, capped at 65536 characters to keep displays and matchers bounded). Default is publicly readable; writability is gated by owner, the writers list, or wizard. Encryption and mailme bridges are deferred.

verbs.name: look_self
verbs.source: verb :look_self() rxd { let summary = this:text_summary(96); return { id: this, title: this:title(), description: this.description, text_length: summary["length"], location: location(this) }; }

verbs.name: text
verbs.source: verb :text() rxd { if (!this:is_readable_by(actor)) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "cannot read note", value: this }; } return this.text; }

verbs.name: read
verbs.source: verb :read() rxd { let text = this:text(); observe({ type: "note_read", actor: actor, note: this, text: text, ts: now() }); return text; }

verbs.name: set_text
verbs.source: verb :set_text(text) rx { if (typeof(text) != "string") { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "set_text requires a string", value: text }; } if (length(text) > 65536) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "note text exceeds 65536 character cap", value: { length: length(text), max: 65536 } }; } if (!this:is_writable_by(actor)) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "cannot write note", value: this }; } this.text = text; observe({ type: "note_edited", actor: actor, note: this, text: text, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: write
verbs.source: verb :write(line) rx { if (typeof(line) != "string") { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "write requires a string", value: line }; } if (!this:is_writable_by(actor)) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "cannot write note", value: this }; } let next = this.text; if (next != "") { next = next + "\n"; } next = next + line; if (length(next) > 65536) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "note text exceeds 65536 character cap", value: { length: length(next), max: 65536 } }; } this.text = next; observe({ type: "note_edited", actor: actor, note: this, text: next, ts: now() }); return length(next); }

verbs.name: erase
verbs.source: verb :erase() rx { if (!this:is_writable_by(actor)) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "cannot erase note", value: this }; } this.text = ""; observe({ type: "note_edited", actor: actor, note: this, text: "", ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: add_writer
verbs.source: verb :add_writer(who) rx { if (this.owner != actor && !has_flag(actor, "wizard")) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "only the note owner or a wizard can add writers", value: this }; } if (!who) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "add_writer requires an object", value: who }; } if (who in this.writers) { return this.writers; } this.writers = this.writers + [who]; return this.writers; }

verbs.name: rm_writer
verbs.source: verb :rm_writer(who) rx { if (this.owner != actor && !has_flag(actor, "wizard")) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "only the note owner or a wizard can remove writers", value: this }; } let next = []; for w in this.writers { if (w != who) { next = next + [w]; } } this.writers = next; return this.writers; }

verbs.name: is_writable_by
verbs.source: verb :is_writable_by(actor_obj) rxd { if (this.owner == actor_obj) { return true; } if (has_flag(actor_obj, "wizard")) { return true; } if (actor_obj in this.writers) { return true; } return false; }
